metadata.description: NLD failure patterns for duplicate output/input handling in React applications
metadata.scope: WebSocket connections, React useEffect cleanup, event listeners, and output streams

NLD-DUP-001.name: Duplicate Output Streams
NLD-DUP-001.description: Multiple output streams writing to the same UI component causing duplicate messages

detection_signatures.context: React state updates that accumulate output without proper deduplication
Duplicate welcome messages indicating multiple output handlers

indicators: same terminal ID but duplicate content

failure_conditions: Multiple WebSocket connections to same instance
SSE and WebSocket both handling same data stream
React state updates not debounced or deduplicated

test_cases: should not duplicate messages when multiple handlers process same data
should deduplicate identical content within time window
should handle concurrent WebSocket and SSE messages properly
prevention_strategies: Implement message deduplication using content hash + timestamp
Use Set-based tracking for processed message IDs
Add debouncing to output state updates

NLD-DUP-002.name: Multiple Event Listeners
NLD-DUP-002.description: Event listeners registered multiple times without proper cleanup, causing duplicate event handling

detection_signatures.context: Multiple addEventListener calls without corresponding removeEventListener
useEffect with empty dependency array but missing cleanup

indicators: same event fired multiple times per trigger
memory leaks in event handler registry

failure_conditions: Event handlers added in non-idempotent way

test_cases: should remove event listeners on component unmount
should not register duplicate event listeners on re-render
should clear event handler registry completely
prevention_strategies: Always return cleanup function from useEffect
Use WeakMap for automatic garbage collection

NLD-DUP-003.name: WebSocket Connection Leak
NLD-DUP-003.description: Multiple WebSocket connections opened to same endpoint without closing previous connections

detection_signatures.context: Multiple WebSocket instantiations without proper connection cleanup
Multiple active WebSocket connections to same terminal endpoint
Multiple connection establishment logs for same session

failure_conditions: Previous WebSocket not closed before creating new one

test_cases: should close existing WebSocket before opening new one
should maintain single connection per terminal ID
should handle connection cleanup on component unmount
prevention_strategies: Add connection state validation before creating new connections
Use connection pooling with proper lifecycle management

NLD-DUP-004.name: Missing useEffect Cleanup
NLD-DUP-004.description: React useEffect hooks without proper cleanup functions, causing resource leaks and duplicate effects

detection_signatures.context: useEffect with empty deps but no cleanup function
useEffect with side effects but missing cleanup

indicators: event listeners persisting after component unmount

failure_conditions: Component unmounts with active side effects

code_locations.context: useEffect hooks with side effects requiring cleanup

test_cases: should cleanup all side effects on unmount
should not create duplicate effects on re-render
should properly handle dependency array changes
prevention_strategies: Always return cleanup function for side effects
Implement useCallback for stable effect dependencies

NLD-DUP-005.name: Input Handler Duplication
NLD-DUP-005.description: Input handlers (sendInput, command processing) being called multiple times for single user action

detection_signatures.context: Same input command logged multiple times in quick succession
Multiple socket.send calls without proper synchronization

failure_conditions: Form submissions not prevented from multiple triggers
WebSocket send not protected against rapid calls

code_locations.context: sendInput function and WebSocket message sending

test_cases: should send input only once per user action
should validate WebSocket state before sending
prevention_strategies: Add input debouncing with useState + useEffect
Use button disabled state during processing

trigger_conditions: User reports duplicate messages in chat interface
Commands being sent multiple times (e.g., 'hello' sent 3 times)
WebSocket connection count > 1 for same terminal
Memory usage growing due to uncleaned listeners

training_scenarios.code_example: useEffect(() => { const handler = ...; addEventListener('event', handler); return () => removeEventListener('event', handler); }, [])
training_scenarios.label: cleanup_complete

training_scenarios.code_example: useEffect(() => { const ws = new WebSocket(url); ws.onmessage = handler; }, [])
training_scenarios.label: connection_leaks
